name: Democrats.org
subject: Derek, tell Trump: shut it down (✍️ add your name)
body:
This is an attack on our democracy. **Add your name: tell Trump to shut down his sham "voter fraud" commission right now.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpmydemocratsorgShutItDown&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523280/4067b0a/37201ebfb/7e6afdd1/3654562703/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523280/4067b0a/37201ebfb/7e6afdde/3654562703/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523280/4067b0a/37201ebfb/7e6afddf/3654562703/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523280/4067b0a/37201ebfb/7e6afddc/3654562703/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170711_dnc_nd&source=em_20170711_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Tyler Muench
subject: Our Last Chance to Stop a $35 Million Stadium Subsidy
body:
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

Prince William County is voting on a $35 million taxpayer-funded corporate welfare project for the Potomac Nationals. The team is worth an estimated $15-25 million. Nevertheless, the team **_insists_** it needs a taxpayer handout. Americans for Prosperity-Virginia has been opposing this subsidy from the start. A [recent article](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=86439e28ae88d7d564de4bb5c7f561d54c6157421f33eff906a0bc9b5d8dccbb7b28c0b8f2d320fb768340ee17d5de223da4e02f9ad482d3 "recent article") from The Cato Institute highlights our opposition to the proposal and mentions my [Washington Post op-ed](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=86439e28ae88d7d5af27423e5044e2fbe8395d818bc3222a703ccbefa19a37087e9cc58c38fbf45af1679a2ba847d85262f1aa2183b4595d "Washington Post op-ed"). My op-ed highlights attempted stadium subsidies in St. Louis and Los Angeles and how they failed on their promises and ended up costing taxpayers millions. To make matters worse, county supervisors recently rejected a proposal to allow residents to vote on the issue. Before officials double down on another burden for taxpayers, **I need your help**. During our fight, County Supervisor Marty Nohe has given the funding debate attention and thorough examination. He is our one shot at stopping this corporate welfare in Prince William County. Join me in urging Supervisor Nohe to oppose this multimillion-dollar stadium subsidy!

[**Sign the letter today**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=86439e28ae88d7d5cf18ae7147b849ffc9248b49abba1a106edcfddc76c9dd9dda65f11bd5ac8dc5e1f1723052ef79bfba1b261f7aa21903 "Sign the letter today"). For Freedom, Tyler MuenchField DirectorAmericans for Prosperity-Virginia
P.S.: To read more about the proposal, [click here ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=86439e28ae88d7d50f301b764687c0794cbd0924abb1110be9e4db58340f484242add94990331953e11e6f93085124c720afa0b77865719c "click here") to read Cato's article.
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=86439e28ae88d7d59e7f2cd17b99d665094d0d80bd3c25bc60893362bc3a2de47563ddde6e0b00df34af7207cf85bd6f926fe8f6b04f048e)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Jill Vogel Announces Plan to Fight Opioid Abuse and Improve Mental Health Services
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
July 11, 2017

---
| Contact: Eloise Hincker(434) 709-9505
---
| Jill Vogel Announces Plan to Fight Opioid Abuse and Improve Mental Health Services

Joins Gillespie and Adams in unveiling policy solutions to save lives, fight addiction, and help sufferers seek hope through recovery programs

FAIRFAX, VA - This morning, Jill Vogel, candidate for Lieutenant Governor, joined her running mates Ed Gillespie and John Adams in releasing a comprehensive plan to tackle Virginia's epidemic of opioid abuse at a Tuesday morning roundtable listening session held with a number of stakeholders and families who have personally suffered.

Speaking with those affected, Vogel and her running mates expressed their commitment to taking the bold, swift action needed to save lives and bring this crisis under control.

"With opioid overdoses claiming more lives than car accidents, the time for action is now," explained Jill Vogel. "Our policy approach strengthens Virginia's commitment to preventing abuse and overdoses while unveiling new treatment and recovery programs to help those suffering from addiction get their lives back on track."
In Virginia's Senate, Vogel has worked on a number of bills to fight the opioid crisis. This year, her bill banning a dangerous synthetic opioid eight times stronger than heroin was signed into law, as was a bill expanding naloxone availability and training to help save lives by reversing overdoses. In 2012, legislation she worked on expanding reporting requirements for drug-exposed infants was also passed and signed into law.
In 2016, Vogel introduced the Behavioral Health Docket Act to reform the criminal justice system by helping accused nonviolent offenders suffering drug addiction or mental health issues receive treatment for the underlying condition which motivated the offense.

The bold new policy approach unveiled today begins with a recognition that arresting opioid addicts will not solve the problem, because scientific research demonstrates that addiction is a disease with a biological basis, not a moral failing.
In response, the plan calls for a focus on intervention, from implementing evidence-based addiction prevention programs in public schools, to dedicating new funding to more effective treatment programs offering a same-day response to those seeking help.

Under the plan, Virginia's leaders will work with health insurance companies to ensure treatment services are covered, while making sure quality resources also exist for the many addicts who lack access to health care, and expanding the use of medication-assisted treatment for those who did not find success in a conventional program.
This new approach also reforms Virginia's criminal justice system. By expanding drug courts, nonviolent offenders will have a chance to treat their underlying addiction instead of facing jail time. Other reforms allow those on probation to seek treatment through their probation officer, without fear that asking for help could lead to more charges.

"We can't arrest our way out of this problem," added Vogel. "By focusing on evidence-based prevention, treatment, and innovative diversion programs, we can save lives and help more Virginians find new beginnings through the road to recovery."

You may [read the full plan by clicking here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bzBcvXLS355syP1JBbTGHxG0sRmzvOnkR4szDaTuOdsMjRHXj0P4pAkVaKk2V44ABqIip-Ol1vTlkwb2nBadORGXVLA1ouQL99rSJdc64krKmvYGl5cLahhqmULa6HrnPnEB4kkV34ggQijpy69Vog2fFJULrr_DwzJwgoxaycYVYP2-r9dsVvTcLOUvwOC64P3AXhKziBrLB93IdzD8vbCclHOmKcgxkD0a1MiafmVAuoNcrX2OJq7qT_53Ewn6&c=LEBvkqNtHfNA2RKckPsuwMxmp1q2QY-ldeSpGQ4nlQpr5GTcwCfEJg==&ch=Bsm4Q-mRU_iR2p49sQSV5VO20437_ewn5s1eV14jPmlS4mOMjLZX4g==).
---
|
---
| ###
---
| |
---

---

name: Team Kaine
subject: surging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| [](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=xijKUNzy9dWTS6OEC368g75oH%2FwAznbS)
---
Derek,

Democratic grassroots momentum is surging across America, and nowhere more so than right here in Virginia. Look at our recent gubernatorial primary: Nearly as many Virginians voted for Democratic nominee Ralph Northam as voted for both major Republican candidates _combined_.

This is a good sign, but it's crucial that Democrats keep up the fight every single day. That's because every day, Republicans are trying to move closer and closer to passing TrumpCare and taking health insurance away from over 20 million people. **They want to know whether the American people will let them get away with it.**

**We won 't, Derek, and here's how we can show it: [Will you help our team hit 10,000 new grassroots supporters to show our power and tell the GOP we're watching their every move?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=X%2B8pEDsUvmm102rNy3d5hr5oH%2FwAznbS)**

Whether you've been with Tim since he was a City Council member in Richmond or are just coming on board, he couldn't be more grateful that you're on his team. Now we have the opportunity to turn our grassroots power into a warning for Republicans. We can show them that we will not allow them to take away Americans' health care. We will not allow them to take us back to the days when people with preexisting conditions couldn't get health insurance. We will not force people to pay out of pocket for routine care that should be covered by insurance companies.

[**Hitting 10,000 new grassroots supporters will send the strongest possible message to Republicans and show them that their attempts to ram through their extreme agenda will not succeed. Will you pitch in?**
](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=i5fhNtCAkQjG9W8jnusk9L5oH%2FwAznbS)
\-- Team Kaine
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JQZiafhM1QmjvWZtKx2Wzb5oH%2FwAznbS)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gNgH9hNnH3f55VC3gE4zAb5oH%2FwAznbS).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: The White House
subject: Only 141 issuers filed to sell plans on Healthcare.gov during the upcoming enrollment period
body:
Americans are suffering under the limited choices and high costs brought on by Obamacare, and the President is committed to solving this problem once and for all by repealing and replacing the disastrous law.
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a4c48696cfa67f7ca47e37b5a92deddc3ac5ea1d844df34de1135783cc585f4f478e401756b085ac9f5b62c6a8847d4d8c)**President Donald J. Trump's Administration is working tirelessly with the Senate to bring relief to the American people from the devastating effects of Obamacare.** Americans are suffering under the limited choices and high costs brought on by Obamacare, and the President is committed to solving this problem once and for all by repealing and replacing the disastrous law. As Obamacare continues to implode on itself, the time to fix this broken system is now.
# Today's Events
**1:00 PM:** Vice President Pence participates in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch **2:00 PM:** President Trump and Vice President Pence meet with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson, Secretary of the Treasury Steven Mnuchin, Secretary of Defense James Mattis, and National Security Advisor H.R. McMaster **2:00 PM:** Press Briefing with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders
# Photo of the Day
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a4da4f5b73dd57cd0d4c63df6916efccaf9aa25855fc795855bae7b7d5b85dbdbde1fe16d04e04e1eb30e947e8612d73a4)**Vice President Mike Pence and Retired United States Army Staff Sergeant Travis Mills of the 82nd Airborne** | July 10, 2017 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen)
# OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY
**FACT:**[ Only 141 issuers filed to sell plans on Healthcare.gov during the upcoming enrollment period ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a47727699ec16f06ff644dddfe9c6a410291ca8af222ee132db67447abd04df121bb6b0b5f2717e9671509cdc7f79c36e3)– down from 281 just two years ago. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a47727699ec16f06ff644dddfe9c6a410291ca8af222ee132db67447abd04df121bb6b0b5f2717e9671509cdc7f79c36e3)
# WHITE HOUSE UPDATES
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a403b836e7f5344cc7816464819c695063402ff4e1a9198bdd80fb42d106fec2aaae62ae9246a6cbe4e0d432c6e506742d)**Yesterday, President Trump[issued a statement](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a4be9d0c1c68c648a6715c6de0dd760769cd543d147e83aedb01cbef148bcef894acbb6d5e72ebd275848c98e64f40adbd) on the liberation of Mosul**. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a41b86491f1ba9092a56697831b10cf1ca743ac737564302438e47d9e132f90d6d19dcafa6bc32d7c57540b36888dc3c4b) **Yesterday, Vice President Pence[met with Prime Minister Youssef Chahed ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a4338a6cdbb785b2dd9be477c564322f5e506d1199ea6f1cb03e420e7953e1e66f1c2a36d4d7f6d2465546982e746b63e5) ** to reaffirm the United States' support for Tunisia. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a4938e4bc06743a8188710709195f9c365a32611879f3644acfe666efee1bc635c8fe2b67476c2e10e13901690f8e46180)**Yesterday, President Trump**[ announced key additions to his Administration.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a4954a6b91b0e2b24841483a78ce0d0419f564531675936107a87ef2af32ce957a5ba5f778e01afab89c4372e8fb83b496)
# West Wing Reads
Each day we put together a list of the top news stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you. **[Sign up](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a431e42d11454bb0a9fb4bade58fcef42b1cc144353dd9e51c337b9dd0cf9db1191e897ba2b61f83d8548e83727bb73227) to receive this daily update from the West Wing.**[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8af96804964a53a431e42d11454bb0a9fb4bade58fcef42b1cc144353dd9e51c337b9dd0cf9db1191e897ba2b61f83d8548e83727bb73227)
---

clean_body: Americans are suffering under the limited choices and high costs brought on by Obamacare, and the President is committed to solving this problem once and for all by repealing and replacing the disastrous law. | | Donald J. Trump's Administration is working tirelessly with the Senate to bring relief to the American people from the devastating effects of Obamacare. Americans are suffering under the limited choices and high costs brought on by Obamacare, and the President is committed to solving this problem once and for all by repealing and replacing the disastrous law. As Obamacare continues to implode on itself, the time to fix this broken system is now. Today's Events 1:00 PM: Vice President Pence participates in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch 2:00 PM: President Trump and Vice President Pence meet with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson, Secretary of the Treasury Steven Mnuchin, Secretary of Defense James Mattis, and National Security Advisor H.R. McMaster 2:00 PM: Press Briefing with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders Photo of the Day President Mike Pence and Retired United States Army Staff Sergeant Travis Mills of the 82nd Airborne | July 10, 2017 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen) OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY FACT:– down from 281 just two years ago. WHITE HOUSE UPDATES , President Trump on the liberation of Mosul. Yesterday, Vice President Pence to reaffirm the United States' support for Tunisia. , President Trump West Wing Reads Each day we put together a list of the top news stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you. to receive this daily update from the West Wing. | |

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: BREAKING: Donald Trump, Jr.'s emails
body:
It's time for Trump to come clean.
---
**Donald Trump, Jr. met with allies of Vladimir Putin to get information to help his dad's campaign. It's time for Donald Trump and his cronies to come clean about their collusion with Russia. Add your name to demand answers.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Demand-the-Truth1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170711_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170711_joc_v2s2")**
Enough is enough, Derek.

Donald Trump, Jr. met with allies of Vladimir Putin last year to get information to use against Hillary Clinton that he was told was coming from the Russian government.

This isn't "fake news" -- it's a fact, proven by screenshots of emails that Don Jr. tweeted himself.

Every day more information comes out about the Trump campaign colluding with Russia during the 2016 election. And time after time, Donald Trump tries to act like there's nothing to see here.

But our country cannot be run on lies. It cannot be run by people who welcomed the opportunity to work with a foreign country to meddle in our elections, or even by those who stood idly by while a foreign government threatened our democracy.

**It's time for Donald Trump, his family, his campaign, and all of his cronies to come clean about their collusion with Russia. The future of our democracy is at stake. Add your name to demand answers today:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Demand-the-Truth1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170711_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170711_joc_v2s2")**
Thanks,

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052329a/4067b0a/371f70325/7e6ae17b/2317042291/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170711_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170711_joc_v2s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052329a/4067b0a/371f70325/7e6ae178/2317042291/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170711_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170711_joc_v2s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052329a/4067b0a/371f70325/7e6ae179/2317042291/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170711_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170711_joc_v2s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052329a/4067b0a/371f70325/7e6ae106/2317042291/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170711_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170711_joc_v2s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Four years from now
body:
#
Team --
I want you to imagine four years from today. . .
The minimum wage is a living wage. Our unemployment rate is the lowest it's been in years, thanks to a steady stream of new jobs from investing in clean energy, infrastructure and innovation.
Healthcare is a right guaranteed to all in our state constitution. No matter what happens on the federal level, Floridians can access healthcare without being denied or charged more based on preexisting conditions.
More five-year-olds than ever before are ready to enter kindergarten, thanks to increased access to early childhood education. Our well-funded public schools are prepared to accommodate them without over-crowding classrooms. We no longer have a teacher shortage, because we're finally paying our teachers what they're worth.
Some of our new high school graduates have already entered their career fields, with help from SHOP 2.0 training. Others are excited about attending college without massive student loan debt.
And we'll think back to this campaign, where we overcame the odds to make all of this possible. We'll know that every donation we made, every door we knocked, and every voter we called was worth it. But we have to start now to make this work, which is why we're asking:
[**Will you invest in this future for Florida by making a contribution of whatever you can afford today?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32fe/9e00690/4d8998f6/24036732/11573270/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170711-future")
I can't wait to achieve this with you. Thank you for being a part of our journey.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32fe/9e00690/4d8998f6/24036732/11573270/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170711-future")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32fe/9e00690/4d8998f6/24036735/11573270/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32fe/9e00690/4d8998f6/24036734/11573270/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32fe/9e00690/4d8998f6/24036737/11573270/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: turning-point-alert@dscc.org
subject: Obamacare vote likely NEXT WEEK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Per the Washington Post, Trump and McConnell are "planning a final, urgent blitz to pressure reluctant GOP senators" to repeal Obamacare.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**Washington Post: "Senate GOP and White House plan final, urgent blitz to pass health-care law"**_
This is it, team.

_The Washington Post_ is reporting that Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are "planning a final, urgent blitz to pressure reluctant GOP senators" to repeal Obamacare.

According to the _Post_ , "Trump associates are working closely with McConnell's legislative aides to track Republican senators" in the hopes of finding 50 votes by the end of next week. They're heavily courting vulnerable Republicans like Nevada's Dean Heller, who are facing pressure from all sides, and our ads are critical to hold them accountable.

[**Team, these next two weeks will be the final showdown over Obamacare repeal. Chip in $1 right now to help ramp up our ads and all our efforts to save Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Trump and McConnell are counting on us to stop paying attention while they lobby Republican senators. They're secretly negotiating a new draft bill right now -- including a potential proposal from Ted Cruz that would make the bill even more extreme.

If we can hold off a vote before senators head home for August recess, we can shut down Obamacare repeal for good. But if we let our focus slip now, millions of Americans stand to lose protections for pre-existing condition coverage and access to health care.

**We can 't let that happen. Democrats are counting on you to act. Chip in $1 now toward the fight to save Obamacare:**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170711-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db5c/2b07114c/3e7db065/73118f3c/182697252/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db5c/2b07114c/3e7db065/73118f3e/182697252/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: IMPORTANT@FlaDems.com
subject: missing your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Team,

**[We need to hear your thoughts on the latest attacks on voting rights.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd25/1a5213b3/7768a782/718b9be9/532459904/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/voting-rights-survey?&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+hear+your+thoughts+on+the+lat&utm_campaign=em071117&source=em071117&refcode=em071117")**

Florida Republicans and Donald Trump are doing everything they can to take away our voting rights. They're using a sham commission under the guise of "election integrity" to collect our personal information and purge voting rolls.

It's important now more than ever that we step up and say this is wrong.

**[But we're missing your input. Take our quick voting rights survey now >>](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd25/1a5213b3/7768a782/718b9be8/532459904/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/voting-rights-survey?&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+But+wersquore+missing+your+input+Take+ou&utm_campaign=em071117&source=em071117&refcode=em071117")**

In just over a week, nearly all 50 states have told Trump they'll resist his attempts. But we can't get complacent: Trump's using Rick Scott and Pam Bondi's voter suppression tactics here in Florida as his roadmap.

**[We need to know your priorities. Can you answer 3 questions on voting rights?](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd25/1a5213b3/7768a782/718b9beb/532459904/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/voting-rights-survey?&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+know+your+priorities+Can+you+&utm_campaign=em071117&source=em071117&refcode=em071117")**

Scott, Bondi, and Trump are counting on us getting tired. Let's show them that we're just getting started in resisting their far-right agenda.

Thanks for your input,
FlaDems.com

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bd25/1a5213b3/7768a782/718b9bea/532459904/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em071117&source=em071117&refcode=em071117") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: just-announced@dscc.org
subject: The votes are in [NEW tote bag design!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
You voted, and the winning design of our official 2017 DSCC tote bag is...
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-totebag?refcode=DPE-20170711-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
**_ANNOUNCING: The Official 2017 DSCC Tote Bag!_
[Pitch in $35 or more to get yours, team (shipping included!) >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-totebag?refcode=DPE-20170711-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
We asked for your input, team -- and we received an overwhelming response to design our official 2017 DSCC tote bag! **Without further delay, the winner is ...**

[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-totebag?refcode=DPE-20170711-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Now you can carry this motto of resistance wherever you go and stand with Senators like:

Al Franken, who **insists** at each and every turn to hold the Trump administration accountable.

Elizabeth Warren, who **persists** to do what's right, even when Mitch McConnell tries to shut her down from speaking out.

And Bernie Sanders, who's out touring in red states right now to **resist** the Republican health care plan.

[**Just make a $35 contribution or more right now to automatically order our Insist. Resist. Persist. tote bag (shipping included).**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-totebag?refcode=DPE-20170711-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5") All donations will support Senate Democrats as they fight for our values and progress!

Thanks,
Team DSCC

P.S. Already pre-ordered the winning design? Don't worry, we have your order! [**You can use this link to order an additional tote bag and support Senate Democrats >> **](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-totebag?refcode=DPE-20170711-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db64/2b07114c/3e903dbd/73118bd2/2832458442/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db64/2b07114c/3e903dbd/73118bcd/2832458442/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db64/2b07114c/3e903dbd/73118bcc/2832458442/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Our Revolution
subject: Join Bernie Sanders and Nina Turner in Silver Spring!
body:
#
Friends
We're excited to invite you to an event this Thursday! Please join Senator Bernie Sanders and Former Ohio Senator Nina Turner as they make a special announcement in Silver Spring, MD.
As Ben Jealous said earlier this week, "When a generation of Americans risks being worse off than those before, tied down by the lack of a livable wage, affordable college and access to quality healthcare, then our leadership must reflect the urgency of this moment." [We couldn't agree more, which is why we're asking you to join us for a special announcement this Thursday.](https://actionnetwork.org/events/join-senator-bernie-sanders-in-silver-spring-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-our-revolution "https://actionnetwork.org/events/join-senator-bernie-sanders-in-silver-spring-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-our-revolution")
**July 13, 2017 • 10:00 AM
Silver Spring Civic Building
8525 Fenton Street, Silver Spring, MD 20910**
****[RSVP](https://actionnetwork.org/events/join-senator-bernie-sanders-in-silver-spring-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-our-revolution "https://actionnetwork.org/events/join-senator-bernie-sanders-in-silver-spring-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-our-revolution")****
We look forward to seeing you on Thursday! Thank you for being a part of the political revolution.
In Solidarity,
Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
